name: ai-cost-calculator-studio
description: A toolkit for building parameterized AI-agent cost calculators. Define your workload as JSON; emit a single-file HTML calculator. Like draw.io, but for LLM cost models.

scripts.test: node scripts/test-engine-smoke.js && node scripts/test-apply.js && node scripts/test-audience-math.js && node scripts/test-derivation-trace.js && node scripts/test-workload-hash.js && node scripts/test-headline-math.js

author: Ajinkya Kulkarni <ajinkya.kulkarni@uah.edu>
